---
title: "Download openme for Android"
description-meta: "Download the openme Android app from Google Play or as an APK — Android 10+."
keywords: [openme Android download, openme APK, openme Google Play]
toc: false
css: download.css
---

{{< include _core.qmd >}}

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  renderHero("android", false);
  renderAllPlatforms();
});
</script>
